messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0070",
  "title": "游戏内容与系统",
  "page_index": 28,
  "page_range": "28"
}

Section text:
游戏内容与系统

message.content: This section consists solely of the heading "游戏内容与系统" (Game Content and Systems). It can only answer high-level navigational or structural questions regarding where the document discusses game mechanics, features, and system architecture. Based on the provided excerpt, it contains no specific entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types, and therefore cannot answer detailed factual, procedural, or analytical questions.
